expectations.text: The decision says the skill does not apply.
expectations.evidence:
Skill does not apply.

Why: request is for plain Python function to deduplicate case-insensitive email addresses. No named framework, library, SDK, platform API, or versioned dependency is involved, so behavior is framework-agnostic and not version-sensitive. Official framework docs are not needed before coding.
